summary: IVX Senior Developer now answers directly like a real senior developer. The old BLOCKED proof-ledger bureaucracy is removed for conversational/advisory senior-dev prompts. Execution still requires owner approval.
whatChanged: backend/services/ivx-owner-ai-dev-mode.ts — added Senior Developer Brain path that answers audit/fix/senior-dev questions directly
backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts — wired the brain path before the execution block
backend/services/ivx-fake-execution-gate.ts — narrowed execution triggers to only immediate deploy/fix commands
backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts — narrowed proof-mode routing to prior-execution proof requests only
backend/services/ivx-owner-ai-dev-mode.test.ts — new unit tests for the brain path
Updated existing gate tests to match the new non-blocking behavior

details.prompt: Rork i want you to audit and fix senior developer...
Do you in a senior developer mode?
Audit and fix the senior developer brain now
Senior developer is not working as senior developer

nextSteps: Ask the IVX Owner AI any technical question: architecture, code review, security, infrastructure, Supabase, etc.
To actually change code, say 'Run a senior developer task: <goal>' — it will execute owner-approved with proof.
The Senior Developer Worker remains owner-gated for commits, deploys, and production mutations.
